# archives/njzetao5-transfer/

Frozen snapshot of archive material transferred from
[notbleaux/NJZetao5](https://github.com/notbleaux/NJZetao5) on 2026-05-11,
when that repository pivoted to become the active PixelOffice Wiki &
Governance Repository.

See [`MANIFEST.md`](./MANIFEST.md) for source commit, full file inventory,
provenance, and the relationship to PixelOffice, ZeSporteXte, and the
existing `pre-historic-legacy/` archive in this repo.

**This folder is reference-only.** Do not edit files here; if material needs
to be revived, copy it out to the appropriate active path.
